# default overrides

The CSVs in this directory are sourced from
[smnorris/bcfishpass](https://github.com/smnorris/bcfishpass) and
redistributed under the terms of `LICENSE-bcfishpass` at the root of
the `link` repository.

Provenance (upstream commit SHA, sync date, byte + shape checksums)
for each file is recorded in `../config.yaml` under the `provenance:`
block.

See [`NOTICE.md`](https://github.com/NewGraphEnvironment/link/blob/main/NOTICE.md)
at the root of `link`'s repository for the full attribution table.
